title: Simple API Response
scenario: Create a prompt to generate a simple API response for a GET request to the '/users' endpoint. Ensure the output includes a JSON object with properties 'id', 'name', and 'email'.
constraints: Must be a valid JSON object

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the output is a valid JSON object.
Check if the output includes the specified properties.
Check if the output adheres to the property inclusion constraint.
